feature: Agent OS / CI helper scripts and research utilities under scripts/ (landed after corpus PR #2)

orch: Keep pr-spec aligned with this branch until merge
Stage scripts explicitly—no blind git add .
backend-implementation-agent: Treat scripts as tooling only; validate imports and paths against repo root when touched
test-agent-fast-ci: Keep tests/test_repo_layout.py green; extend CI only if wiring scripts into workflows is in scope

acceptance_criteria: New scripts are intentional scope (agent gates, research helpers, optional API smoke tests + README)
No protected-path deletions without approved_deletions channel
Secrets/API keys remain out of git (scripts consume env or CLI flags only)
